mapper.sql: review_id, user_id, book_id, rating, content, like_count, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_review (user_id, book_id, rating, content, like_count, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{rating}, #{content}, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, r.book_id, e.book_title, r.rating, r.content, r.like_count, CASE WHEN rl.like_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_liked, r.create_time FROM tb_review r LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON r.book_id = e.book_id LEFT JOIN tb_review_like rl ON r.review_id = rl.review_id AND rl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, r.book_id, e.book_title, r.rating, r.content, r.like_count, 0 as is_liked, r.create_time FROM tb_review r LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON r.book_id = e.book_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_review WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_review SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE tb_review SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE tb_review SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(CAST(rating AS REAL)), 0.0) FROM tb_review WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND is_deleted = 0
